app.name: jordium-gantt-vue3
app.one_liner: A modern Vue 3 Gantt chart component library with built-in resource view and resource planning capabilities for project management, task scheduling, and resource allocation.

screens.name: Gantt Chart View
screens.purpose: Display and interact with task timelines and resource allocations in unified task or resource views.
primary_actions: Edit tasks via double-click or context menu
Switch between task and resource views

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist updated task or resource assignment data after user interaction.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core Gantt timeline rendering with virtual scrolling
week 1: Integrate basic resource assignment mapping
acceptance_tests: Hourly view must support precise taskbar dragging without calculation errors
Milestone tooltips must not display placeholder text like '1111111111'
PDF export must render non-ASCII characters correctly without garbled text
Switching from task view to resource view must preserve correct date range and today marker position
